summary: While this role offers the excellent work-life balance and predictable schedule you prioritize, the 'Highly Analytical' thinking style represents a fundamental mismatch with your preference for procedural, protocol-driven work. The requirement for advanced statistics, database logic, and autonomous troubleshooting will likely create significant professional stress given your struggles with math and logical deduction. Despite the low burnout risk associated with patient care, the specific cognitive demands of this position make it an unsustainable career fit for your skill set.
